title: Tutorial screen to Onboarding screen
scenario: Verify that navigating from Tutorial to Onboarding tab displays the correct start page with image and text matching Figma design.
steps: Open the app and navigate to the Tutorial screen.
From the Tutorial screen, tap/click on the Onboarding tab.
Observe the page that opens (should be the start Onboarding page).
Check that the displayed image matches the Figma design.
Check that the displayed text matches the Figma design.
expected: The start Onboarding page opens with the correct image and text, matching the Figma design.
